goal: Tighten the ResponseAPI beta basis around real nightly evidence so the promoted subset is clearly evidence-backed instead of only decision-backed.
successCriteria: ResponseAPI beta status is explicitly tied to nightly evidence freshness for the core subset.
Doctor, scorecard, and verification report can distinguish evidence-backed beta from temporarily unverified beta.
Deferred helper families remain clearly outside the promoted subset.
explicitlyOutOfScope: No promotion of stream, JSON, messages, reasoning, or chat-completion helper families.
